title: Prawas Din

or **Surinamese Immigration Day** is the day that commemorates the arrival of the first Indian contract workers in Suriname on June 5, 1873, on the Lalla Rookh.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The commemoration takes place on June 5.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Suriname holiday

Further information: [Indian Arrival Day](/wiki/Indian_Arrival_Day "Indian Arrival Day")

| Prawas Din | |
| --- | --- |
| Official name | Prawas Din |
| Also called | Surinamese Immigration Day |
| Observed by | [Hindustani-Surinamese](/wiki/Indo-Surinamese "Indo-Surinamese") community in the Netherlands and Suriname |
| Date | 5 June |
| Next time | 5 June 2026 (2026-06-05) |
| Frequency | Annual |
| Related to | [Indian Arrival Day](/wiki/Indian_Arrival_Day "Indian Arrival Day") |

**Prawas Din** or **Surinamese Immigration Day** is the day that commemorates the arrival of the first Indian contract workers in Suriname on June 5, 1873, on the Lalla Rookh.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The commemoration takes place on June 5.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
